jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Craftsvilla - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Craftsvilla invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Marketplace Manager at our Varanasi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Craftsvilla:
Craftsvilla is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Craftsvilla!
